params.name: Lewis Chessmen
params.description:
On Jul 16, 1831, Chess was on display for the first time as one of the 10 treasures of the British Museum. 

An important antique in Scotland. This exquisite chess set is made from walrus ivory and whale teeth. It includes the sitting kinds and queens, bishops with a crown, knights on the horse, and standing pawns, all of which are obelisk-shaped. It is said that if you learn the essence of this chess, you possess the power to change the future.
